name: Vinegar Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the ingredients into a kettle and heat until melted.
2. Add sugar and vinegar to the melted mixture and stir until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Continue stirring occasionally.
4. Boil the mixture until it reaches the hard-ball stage (when dropped in cold water, it becomes brittle).
5. Turn off the heat and pour onto a buttered platter to cool.
6. Pull and cut as with molasses candy.
